mail.segunda_linha_bem_vindo: Thank you for signing up! Please confirm your email by clicking the button below:
mail.link_valido_24h: This link is valid for 24 hours.
mail.segunda_linha_reset_senha: Reset your password by clicking the button below:
mail.link_valido_15m: This link is valid for 15 minutes.
mail.avaliador_segunda_linha_complemento: is registering with the company to conduct candidate evaluations for available job positions.
mail.avaliador_terceira_linha_bem_vindo: Please confirm the registration by clicking the button below:
mail.avaliador_quarta_linha_bem_vindo: If you do not recognize or do not agree with this request, click the button below to reject the request:
mail.avaliador_link_valido_72h: This link is valid for 72 hours.
mail.avaliador_welcome_segunda_linha: We have great news: the company
mail.avaliador_welcome_segunda_linha_compleme: has confirmed your registration as an evaluator.
mail.avaliador_welcome_terceira_linha: From now on, all the features in your profile menu are available, allowing you to access the platform, conduct evaluations, and follow processes with more autonomy.
mail.avaliador_welcome_quarta_linha: Welcome to our network of evaluators!
mail.avaliador_reject_segunda_linha: Thank you for your interest in acting as an evaluator at the company
mail.avaliador_reject_terceira_linha: After review, unfortunately your registration request was not approved by the company at this time.
mail.avaliador_reject_quarta_linha: You may apply again in the future if new opportunities arise.

resumo_notificacoes.introducao: You have been invited by the Whizzat platform to evaluate candidate skills.
resumo_notificacoes.prazo_texto: The invitation expires in 72 hours. If not accepted within this period, it will be automatically assigned to another specialist.
resumo_notificacoes.regra_concorrencia: If another specialist accepts first, the request will be removed from your queue and will no longer appear in your dashboard.
resumo_notificacoes.prazo_resumido: Invitation valid for 72 hours. After this period it may be reassigned.

formulario_avaliador.assunto_prefixo: Action Required: A new questionnaire has been completed and is ready for review
formulario_avaliador.titulo: A questionnaire submitted for evaluation has been completed.
formulario_avaliador.introducao: The responses are now available on the platform and can be used to continue the evaluation process for the corresponding skill.
formulario_avaliador.introducao_2: Access Whizzat to review the responses and proceed with the next steps if necessary.
formulario_avaliador.introducao_3: If you have already reviewed this information, please disregard this message.

formulario_candidato.assunto_prefixo: Action Required: You have received a new evaluation questionnaire
formulario_candidato.titulo: You have received a new questionnaire related to a skill evaluation in your profile.
formulario_candidato.introducao: Completing this questionnaire is an important step in the evaluation process and helps keep your profile up to date while highlighting your skills.
formulario_candidato.introducao_2: Please access the platform and complete the questionnaire as soon as possible.
formulario_candidato.introducao_3: If you have already completed it, please disregard this message.

agenda_avaliador.assunto_prefixo: Action Required: Interview date confirmed by the candidate
agenda_avaliador.titulo: The interview has been confirmed by the candidate.
agenda_avaliador.introducao: The interview is now officially scheduled and can take place as planned.
agenda_avaliador.introducao_2: Access the platform to review the details and, if necessary, follow the next steps in the evaluation process.
agenda_avaliador.introducao_3: If you have already viewed this information, please disregard this message.

agenda_candidato.assunto_prefixo: Action Required: New interview date suggestion received
agenda_candidato.titulo: A new interview date and time have been suggested.
agenda_candidato.introducao: A new date and time suggestion is now available for your skill evaluation interview.
agenda_candidato.introducao_2: Once you confirm it, the interview will be officially scheduled. If the proposed time is not suitable, you may decline it so that a new suggestion can be provided.
agenda_candidato.introducao_3: If you have already completed this action, please disregard this message.

avaliacao_finalizado.assunto_prefixo: Action Required: Your skill evaluation has been completed
avaliacao_finalizado.titulo: Your skill evaluation has been successfully completed.
avaliacao_finalizado.introducao: All stages of the evaluation process have been completed, and the results are now available on the platform along with the information recorded during the evaluation.
avaliacao_finalizado.introducao_2: Access Whizzat to view the details and track the progress of your professional profile.
avaliacao_finalizado.introducao_3: Thank you for your participation and for the time you dedicated to this process.

auth.se_existir_email: If the email exists, a link will be sent to the provided address
